app.name: Boilerplate App

errors.rate_limiter_unavailable: Rate limiter unavailable, please try again
auth.validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.password.must_be_12_chars: Password must be at least 12 characters
auth.password.must_have_number: Password must contain at least one number
auth.password.must_have_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.password.must_have_special: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.register.email_exists: An account with this email already exists
auth.register.success: Registration successful. Please check your email to confirm your account.
auth.login.locked: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts
auth.login.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in
auth.confirm.token_invalid: Invalid or already used confirmation token
auth.recover.email_sent: If this email exists, you will receive password reset instructions
auth.2fa.setup_instructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
auth.2fa.backup_codes_warning: Save these backup codes in a secure place. You will need them if you lose access to your authenticator.
validation.file_too_large: File size {} bytes exceeds maximum of {} bytes
validation.mime_type_mismatch: Declared type {} does not match detected type {}
validation.fields.name: Name
validation.fields.title: Title

admin.roles.validation.resource_type_inv: resource_type must be at most 255 characters
admin.roles.validation.scope_invalid: resource_type and resource_id must be provided together
conflict.email_is_current: This email is already your current email
conflict.email_change_requested: Email change requested. Please confirm your new email.
customer.no_profile: No customer profile linked to this user
customer.project_unavailable: Project not available for this customer
customer.unit_unavailable: Unit not available for this customer
ticket.unit_project_mismatch: unit_id does not belong to the informed project_id
ticket.update_nothing: Nothing to update. Provide status and/or message.
middleware.access_denied: You don't have permission to access this resource
authorization.forbidden_action: You do not have permission to %{action} on %{resource}

upload.no_file_field: No file field found in multipart form
ws.invalid_data_type: Field 'data' must be a JSON object
email.confirmation.subject: Confirm your email address
email.confirmation.html_body: Thank you for registering! Please click the button below to confirm your email address:
email.password_reset.subject: Reset your password
email.password_reset.html_body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to create a new password:
email.password_reset.html_warning: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
email.two_factor_setup.subject: Your 2FA setup codes
email.two_factor_setup.html_body: Your 2FA has been enabled. Here are your setup details:
email.two_factor_setup.html_backup_warni: Warning: these codes are displayed only once. Save them in a password manager.
email.password_changed.subject: Your password has been changed
email.password_changed.body_text: Your password was successfully changed. If you didn't make this change, please contact support immediately.
email.password_changed.html_warning: If you didn't make this change, please contact support immediately.
email.layout.sent_to: This email was sent to {{ to_email }}
email.welcome.heading: Welcome to {{ app_name }}! We're glad to have you here.
email.welcome.instruction: To get started, please confirm your email address by clicking the button below:
email.welcome.fallback_instruction: Or copy and paste this link in your browser:
email.welcome.expiry_notice: This link expires in 24 hours. If you did not create this account, you can ignore this email.
email.confirmation.instruction: To get started, please confirm your email address by clicking the button below:
email.confirmation.fallback_instruction: Or copy and paste this link in your browser:
email.confirmation.expiry_notice: This link expires in 24 hours. If you did not create this account, you can ignore this email.
email.password_reset.instruction: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to create a new password:
email.password_reset.fallback_instructio: Or copy and paste this link in your browser:
email.password_reset.expiry_notice: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.
email.password_changed.heading: Your password was changed successfully.
email.password_changed.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.
email.password_changed.sessions_notice: For security, all your active sessions have been terminated.
email.two_factor_setup.heading: Your two-factor authentication (2FA) has been set up successfully. Here are the details:
email.two_factor_setup.qr_instruction: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
email.two_factor_setup.backup_heading: Backup Codes (save in a secure place!)
email.two_factor_setup.backup_warning: Warning: these codes are displayed only once. Save them in a password manager.
